issues.title: Cannot dynamic add or remove tool in mcp server

comments.body:
@simsnow, please this check this example, demonstrating how a MCP server can dynamically update its available tools at runtime, and how a client can detect and use these updated tools.
https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai-examples/tree/main/model-context-protocol/dynamic-tool-update

I'm closing this issue with this example: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai-examples/tree/main/model-context-protocol/dynamic-tool-update
Feel free to re-open it if needed.
